name: Honeymoon Sourdoughs
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients thoroughly and turn out onto a floured board.
2. Knead lightly and then roll out gently.
3. Cut into biscuits.
4. Brush lightly with melted butter or margarine.
5. Place on a greased cookie sheet.
6. Bake at 450 degrees for about 15 minutes.
Makes 9 Large biscuits.
